order.findDomain: Nemo domain ɗinka kuma bincika samuwar.
order.available: Ee! Domain ɗinka {domain} yana samuwa! Zaka iya yin rajista a {cost}. Farashin sabuntawa zai zama {renewal}.
order.taken: Yi hakuri! Domain ɗinka {domain} an riga an ɗauke shi!
order.agreeCheckbox: Na karanta sharuɗɗan da ke sama kuma na yarda.
order.premiumAvailable: Ee! Domainku {domain} yana samuwa kuma yana domain na premium. An kashe rajista kai tsaye. Aika imel zuwa {email} idan kuna son siyan wannan domain don {cost} a shekara.
order.premiumTaken: Yi haƙuri! Domainku {domain} an riga an ɗauke shi! Ku ne mai shi? Kuna iya canja shi, kuma yana domain na premium. An kashe rajista kai tsaye. Aika imel zuwa {email} idan kuna son siyan wannan domain don {cost} a shekara.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Za a sabunta biyan kuɗi kai tsaye bayan kowace shekara akan {cost} har sai an soke.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Ta hanyar ticking wannan akwati, kuna amincewa cewa kuna siyan kayan biyan kuɗi wanda ke sabuntawa kai tsaye (Bisa ga Sharuɗɗan da aka tsara a sama) kuma an caje shi zuwa katin kiredit da kuka bayar a yau. Idan kuna so ku soke sabuntawar kai tsaye, kuna iya shiga tashar abokin ciniki (Nan) zaɓi sabis ɗin da ke aiki kuma danna haɗin Soke ko aika imel a: billing{'@'}interserver.net. Ta hanyar ticking akwatin kuma danna Sanya Odana a ƙasa, kuna kuma amincewa cewa kun karanta, fahimta, kuma kun amince da Sharuɗɗan mu da Manufar Sirrin mu.
order.searchingDomain: Da fatan za ku jira! Ana neman wannan sunan domain.
order.loadingDomainFields: Da fatan za ku jira! Ana loda filayen domain.

nameservers.title: Sabobin Suna na Domain
nameservers.deleteConfirm: Kana kan share sabar sunan domain ɗinka.
nameservers.suggestedNameserver: Sabar Suna da aka ba da shawara
nameservers.registeredNameservers: Sabar Suna da aka Yi Rajista
nameservers.suggestedApplied: An yi amfani da sabar suna da aka ba da shawara. Danna Sabunta don adanawa.

whois.title: Sirrin Whois
whois.currentlyEnabled: Sirrin Whois na aiki a yanzu don {hostname}.
whois.orderSuccess: An sanya oda sirrin Whois cikin nasara!
whois.whoisDisabled: An kashe kuma An soke Sirrin Whois.
whois.renewalNote: Ana sabunta sirrin Whois kowace watanni 12 daga ranar kunna. Farashin sabuntawar ƙarin sirrin Whois shine {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Sirrin Whois ba ya samuwa ga wannan TLD.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Sirrin Sadarwa yana ɓoye asalin mai rajista lokacin da mai amfani ya yi bincike na WHOIS akan yankin domain na wannan mai rajista.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Fa'idar samun Sirrin Sadarwa shine cewa asalin mai rajista, ciki har da adreshin gida, lambar waya, da adreshin imel, an kiyaye shi daga masu aika spam, masu satar asali da masu zamba.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Lokacin da masu rajista suka kunna sabis ɗin Sirrin Sadarwa, bayanan sadarwa da aka rufe sun bayyana a cikin ma'ajin bayanan WHOIS na jama'a.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Sirrin Sadarwa yana samuwa don {cost} a kowace domain a kowace shekara.
whois.enableNow: Don kunna Sirrin Sadarwa don Domainku, Sanya Oda Yanzu.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Farashin sirrin Whois: {cost} a shekara. Shin kuna da tabbacin cewa kuna son sanya wannan oda?
whois.enableMessage: Domainku {hostname} yana da ƙarin sirrin Whois da aka biya wanda ba a kunna shi ba tukuna. Kuna so a kunna shi yanzu?
whois.disableMessage: Ƙarin sirrin Whois na domainku {hostname} a halin yanzu yana kunna. Shin kuna da tabbacin cewa kuna son kashe shi da soke shi?

lock.title: Kulle/Buɗe Domain
lock.activateLock: Kuna so ku Kunna kulle domain?
lock.inactivateLock: Kuna so ku Kashe kulle domain?

renew.title: Sabunta
renew.tip1: Ya kamata a sabunta domain a ranar ƙarewa ko kafin ta.
renew.tip2: Idan domain ya ƙare na iya samun lokacin alheri daga ranar ƙarewa don sabuntawa.
renew.tip3: Kunna Sirrin Whois don ɓoye bayananku na sadarwa lokacin da mai amfani ya yi bincike na WHOIS akan yankin domain na wannan mai rajista.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Don sabunta domainku, da fatan za a biya lissafin da ke akwai.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Jimlar farashin: {cost}. Shin kuna da tabbacin cewa kuna son sanya wannan oda na sabuntawa?
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: An sanya oda na sabuntawar domain cikin nasara!
